# Chapter 8: Population biology, ecology, epidemiology  (~90 pp)
- 8.1 Population dynamics: growth, carrying capacity (12) · 8.2 Predator-prey models (12) · 8.3 SIR/SEIR epidemic models (15) · 8.4 Ecosystems as networks (15) · 8.5 Antibiotic resistance, evolution of resistance (12) · 8.6 Conservation biology engineering-first (12) · 8.7 Failure section: ecosystem collapse, pandemic propagation, COVID-19 modelling lessons (12)

**Archetype**: scaling, transport, control. **Project**: fit a SIR model to a real epidemic dataset; report properly. **Exercises**: 30.
